summary: Iteration 42c — Org-wide Placement Stability Trajectory. Backend fully validated (55/55 pass: 6 new iter42c + 49 regression iter42b/42/41/40b). Frontend UI flow code review shows EmergingPlacementConcernsPanel correctly wires the new TRAJ_META pill + StabilitySparkline + drilldown modal with all required data-testids. Live browser-driven UI verification was partial because Playwright fresh-context sessions repeatedly bounced welcome→login (auth cookie lost across tool calls) — one run reached /compliance successfully but the Safeguarding Intelligence tab click did not fire in time. No backend or frontend code bugs were found; recommend main agent to self-verify the UI tab flow.
action_items: Main agent: self-verify the Safeguarding Intelligence tab → EmergingPlacementConcernsPanel renders end-to-end in a real browser session (the cookies-across-Playwright-runs friction prevented full UI assertion). All data-testids are in place per code review.
critical_code_review_comments: EmergingPlacementConcernsPanel.jsx — clean. TRAJ_META lookup is exhaustive (7 labels match backend enum). 'Building trajectory' fallback when sparkline empty is a nice supportive touch.
Sparkline reuse via StabilitySparkline(showAxis=false, width=110, height=32, testid='row-sparkline-{id}') keeps a single source of truth — good DRY.
Drilldown modal embeds full PlacementStabilityCard giving an explainable factor chain — supportive, not punitive.
Backend _compact_trajectory() guarantees compact sparkline points {week_ending_at, score, status, status_label} with NO PII / no narrative — explicitly tested.
trajectory.score_current == row.score invariant is enforced and tested (single factor engine — no drift).
Tone audit: 'longitudinal 8-week trajectories', 'quietly celebrate positive trajectory', 'Where support may be needed' — supportive language preserved; no league-table / punitive copy.

success_rate.frontend: code-review PASS; live browser UI assertion partial (session friction, not a product bug)

test_credentials: manager@care.local / Manager@123 (used for backend pytest + frontend manual flow)
seed_data_creation: None — existing demo residents (Maddy/Mads, Leo, Aisha, Jordy) provide ≥10 weeks placement history so trajectories populate with 8 weekly points.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend endpoint /api/placement-stability/emerging-concerns is verified manager+ gated, returns rows with full `trajectory` block {trajectory_label, trajectory_label_text, trajectory_summary, weeks_returned, score_min, score_max, score_current, score_earliest, sparkline[]} where each sparkline point has exactly {week_ending_at, score, status, status_label}. trajectory.score_current==row.score invariant holds. Supportive tone enforced. Frontend testids confirmed in code: emerging-concerns-panel, resident-row-traj-{id}, row-sparkline-{id}, resident-drilldown-modal. To re-test UI: log in fresh as manager@care.local, pick Children's workspace at /welcome, then /compliance → click 'Safeguarding Intelligence' tab — note that across separate Playwright contexts the session cookie is not retained, so login + workspace pick must be done in a single browser_automation invocation.
